name: Orchard Pass #0005
description: Genesis Pass 5 of 10 — proof of operation for a Tree in The Orchard, an open-source environmental DePIN on Chia. Holder operates one of the first 10 Trees in the network.

attributes.value: Founding credentials for The Orchard — an open-source environmental DePIN on the Chia blockchain. Each Pass is the on-chain identity of a Tree (ESP32-class sensing node). Holders operate the first Trees in the network, collecting verifiable environmental data and earning $JUICE for verified Season uptime. Ten Passes in the genesis batch.
